company: Kids in Motion Nursery and Early Years Academy
summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Kids in Motion is a nursery and early years academy based in North London that combines expert childcare with a unique movement-based curriculum designed to nurture children's curiosity, confidence, and physical development. They offer EYFS-based education through their K.I.M® Academic Programme, which integrates physical activity, sensory input, and play to support emotional, social, and academic growth.
